title: sesleria alba subsp. voronovii
intro: Sesleria alba subsp. voronovii, also known as Voronov's fescue or mountain fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sesleria alba subsp. voronovii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
